title: Tier 1 Calculator Ranking Failure Diagnosis — EVIDENCE ONLY

data_sources.index_status: URL Inspection API (verified for 10/10 T1 calcs)

root_causes.proven_technical_issue: None — all 10 T1 calcs: canonical=self, robots=index,follow, HTTP 200, schema present
root_causes.proven_content_issue: Generic titles on 2/3 (FIXED Jun 7). Query-year mismatch on tax-calculator (getting 2022/2023 traffic).
root_causes.proven_internal_authority_issue: T1 calcs have 2-4 internal blog links + decision links. Internal linking is functional but not exceptional.
root_causes.likely_external_authority_issue: 0 backlinks confirmed. SERP competitors have DR 70-100 with 250-5,000+ backlinks. 38 queries rank uniformly at positions 71-99 — pattern consistent with domain-level ceiling.
root_causes.unknown: Exact contribution of content quality gap vs backlink gap cannot be isolated without controlled experiment.

confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH — evidence is circumstantial but highly consistent across multiple data sources
